name: test-log-writer-misdeclaration
description: Synthetic mis-declared fixture for cycle/496 AC4 oracle. Declares role:dispatch + admin_only:false + activation_log_writer:true — the mis-declaration. The renderer must refuse with exit code 4 + stderr containing 'activation_log_writer mis-declaration:'. NEVER rendered to a substrate workflow; exists solely to keep the AC4 negative-case smoke alive. Mirrors the cycle/485 declaration-only fixture pattern (small, minimal, just enough fields for the renderer to walk validation to the activation_log_writer gate before refusing).
responsibilities: exercise the renderer's activation_log_writer mis-declaration gate at exit code 4
disallowed_surfaces: everything (synthetic fixture; the wake-class writer-ownership partition still applies — this manifest exists to demonstrate refusal, not to be rendered)
